response.justification: Despite a strong full-stack and open-source background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ experience in professional industrial or embedded contexts beyond a brief role at National Instruments, and shows no evidence of expertise in core requirements like STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols — critical for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to work across diverse systems and mentor teams
concerns: Minimal recent or relevant C++/STL experience for industrial automation
No evidence of experience with MQTT, REST in IoT, or industrial cybersecurity standards
Lacks exposure to on-premises industrial platforms or message-broker architectures
